description_long: This is a military-style helmet with a rounded dome shape, constructed from a hard, likely metal or composite shell. The exterior is predominantly dark gray, heavily weathered with patches of red and white discoloration, suggesting exposure to harsh conditions or simulated battle damage. The surface is mottled and uneven, with visible scuffs, scratches, and stains, giving it a rugged, worn appearance. A chin strap is attached on both sides, hanging loosely, and appears to be made of fabric or webbing with a metal buckle for fastening. The helmet lacks any visible vents, visors, or decorative emblems, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The interior is not visible, but it is likely lined with padding for comfort and impact absorption.
description: A heavily weathered, dark gray military-style helmet with mottled red and white stains, a rugged surface, and a hanging chin strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded dome, mottled surface, and both sides of the chin strap hanging down.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pronounced red stains and the profile of the chin strap and buckle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back curvature of the helmet and the continuation of the weathered, stained surface.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible red and white mottling, and the chin strap hanging more clearly on this side.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract mottled pattern with irregular red and white stains over a dark gray base, simulating heavy wear and damage.
